column1: Tyler Freeman headlines the Beat The Streak board tonight, leading off at home in hitter-friendly Coors with a prime platoon edge—expect that steady bat to thrive against Justin Wrobleski. Right behind him, Xavier Edwards brings a reliable top-of-the-order profile and another platoon advantage, making him a strong option in Miami’s lineup. Drake Baldwin also deserves a nod with a similar outlook in a favorable spot. For those looking to dig deeper, Yandy Diaz and Alec Burleson round out the list with solid matchups and consistent contact skills.
